visual_focus: Macro shot of a clear, lightweight gel texture being applied to cooling stone rollers.
sora_prompt: High fidelity, cinematic close-up of a clear gel texture being smoothed out by an icy jade roller. Soft morning light over smooth river stones, minimal and elegant. 4k, 60fps.

visual_focus: A soft-focus morning routine in a Playa del Carmen interior. Golden hour light hitting the 'Pure Essence' glass jar.
message_en: Continuous hydration for your natural barrier.
message_es: Hidratación continua para tu barrera natural.
target_issue: Dry skin and basic routine maintenance
sora_prompt: A beautiful lifestyle shot of a woman with glowing skin opening a frosted glass jar of cream. Tropical golden hour sunlight, breezy linen curtains, extreme realism and slow, calming motion. 4k, 60fps.

visual_focus: Slow-motion water droplets on fresh rosemary leaves, transitioning to a scalp massage with rich lather.
target_issue: Hair loss and lack of volume
sora_prompt: Macro dramatic lighting on fresh rosemary sprigs catching a water droplet. Cut to a luxurious shower scene with rich foam, holistic wellness vibe. Japandi aesthetic. 4k, 60fps.
